questions.q: According to a study published on April 27, 2026, researchers at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln developed a new bird flu (H5N1) vaccine that showed strong efficacy in mice and which other animal?
A long-term study highlighted by BMJ Medicine on April 27, 2026, revealed that engaging in what specific exercise habit can significantly lower the risk of death?
options: A variety of different physical activities
Lifting weights for exactly 30 minutes daily
Only participating in high-intensity interval training
Running at least 5 miles every morning
questions.correctText: A variety of different physical activities

questions.q: On April 27, 2026, Ascletis Pharma announced it had completed U.S. Phase II study enrollment for ASC30, an oral small molecule GLP-1R agonist aimed at treating what condition?
According to a Federal Register notice published on April 27, 2026, the FDA scheduled a May 28 advisory committee meeting to discuss the 2026-2027 formula for which vaccine?
On April 27, 2026, Intellia Therapeutics scheduled the release of its highly anticipated Phase 3 clinical trial data for lonvoguran ziclumeran, a CRISPR gene editing candidate treating what disease?
